attributes.description: AWS Application Load Balancer dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] ELB - Application

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS Application Load Balancers across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by load balancer at the top. Spot elevated 5xx, backend errors, and unhealthy hosts in the summary table then click any load balancer to drill down.
To get started, configure CloudWatch metric streams for your Application Load Balancers with the Elastic agent.

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancer count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Count of load balancers over time, classified per time bucket by health — erroring (target 5xx > 0), degraded (unhealthy hosts or rejected connections), healthy, or idle. Distinct load balancers are counted per bucket. A rising erroring series indicates spreading backend failures.

attributes.title: Load balancer count over time
attributes.description: Count of load balancers over time, classified per time bucket by health — erroring (target 5xx > 0), degraded (unhealthy hosts or rejected connections), healthy, or idle. Distinct load balancers are counted per bucket. A rising erroring series indicates spreading backend failures.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
| STATS
    requests = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))),
    be_5xx = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))),
    rejected = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    active = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    healthy_n = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    unhealthy_n = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    be_5xx > 0, "erroring",
    unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded",
    healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS
    total = COUNT(*),
    erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring",
    degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "degraded",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy",
    unknown = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "Unknown"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
| STATS
    requests = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))),
    be_5xx = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))),
    rejected = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    active = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    healthy_n = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    unhealthy_n = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    be_5xx > 0, "erroring",
    unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded",
    healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS
    total = COUNT(*),
    erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring",
    degraded = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "degraded",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy",
    unknown = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "Unknown"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
  AND TargetGroup IS NULL AND AvailabilityZone IS NULL
| STATS
    c_inv = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))),
    c_err = COALESCE(SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))), 0),
    c_rejected_count = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    c_active_conn = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    c_healthy_hosts = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    c_unhealthy_hosts = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    c_dur_avg = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))),
    c_dur_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))),
    c_processed_bytes = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)))
  BY LoadBalancer, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region
| EVAL
    c_state_sort = CASE(
      c_err > 0, 1,
      c_unhealthy_hosts > 0 OR c_rejected_count > 0, 2,
      c_healthy_hosts > 0 OR c_inv > 0 OR c_active_conn > 0, 3,
      4),
    c_state = CASE(
      c_err > 0, "erroring",
      c_unhealthy_hosts > 0 OR c_rejected_count > 0, "degraded",
      c_healthy_hosts > 0 OR c_inv > 0 OR c_active_conn > 0, "healthy",
      "Unknown")
| SORT c_state_sort ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
  AND TargetGroup IS NULL AND AvailabilityZone IS NULL
| STATS
    c_inv = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))),
    c_err = COALESCE(SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL))), 0),
    c_rejected_count = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    c_active_conn = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL))),
    c_healthy_hosts = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    c_unhealthy_hosts = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL))),
    c_dur_avg = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))),
    c_dur_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`, NULL))),
    c_processed_bytes = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ProcessedBytes`, NULL)))
  BY LoadBalancer, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region
| EVAL
    c_state_sort = CASE(
      c_err > 0, 1,
      c_unhealthy_hosts > 0 OR c_rejected_count > 0, 2,
      c_healthy_hosts > 0 OR c_inv > 0 OR c_active_conn > 0, 3,
      4),
    c_state = CASE(
      c_err > 0, "erroring",
      c_unhealthy_hosts > 0 OR c_rejected_count > 0, "degraded",
      c_healthy_hosts > 0 OR c_inv > 0 OR c_active_conn > 0, "healthy",
      "Unknown")
| SORT c_state_sort ASC

embeddableConfig.title: Load Balancers
embeddableConfig.description: All load balancers, ranked worst-first by health. Click a load balancer to drill into its metrics. State reflects the latest health within a 5-minute freshness window. Total requests and target 5xx are summed over the selected time range; latency columns are the average and peak backend response time (seconds) over the range.

embeddableConfig.title: Load balancers by health
embeddableConfig.description: Share of load balancers by latest health — erroring (target 5xx > 0), degraded (unhealthy hosts or rejected connections), healthy, or idle. Uses the most recent value per load balancer within a 5-minute freshness window. A growing erroring slice indicates active backend failures.

attributes.title: Load balancers by health
attributes.description: Share of load balancers by latest health — erroring (target 5xx > 0), degraded (unhealthy hosts or rejected connections), healthy, or idle. Uses the most recent value per load balancer within a 5-minute freshness window. A growing erroring slice indicates active backend failures.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
| STATS requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),
  be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)),
  rejected = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),
  active = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)),
  healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),
  unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),
  last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| EVAL lb_state = CASE(
    be_5xx > 0, "erroring",
    unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded",
    healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-*
| WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != ""
| STATS requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)),
  be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)),
  rejected = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)),
  active = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)),
  healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)),
  unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)),
  last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| EVAL lb_state = CASE(
    be_5xx > 0, "erroring",
    unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded",
    healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS lbs = COUNT(*) BY lb_state

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of load balancers — distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

attributes.description: Total number of load balancers — distinct load balancers reporting metrics in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND stat == "Sum" | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5 | STATS lbs = COUNT(*)

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND stat == "Sum" | STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest) <= 5 | STATS lbs = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of erroring load balancers — those whose latest data shows backend (target) 5xx responses, within a 5-minute freshness window. A non-zero count indicates active backend failures.

embeddableConfig.description: Number of degraded load balancers — those with unhealthy hosts or rejected connections but no 5xx errors, within a 5-minute freshness window. Indicates reduced backend capacity.

    requests = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL))),

embeddableConfig.title: HTTP responses over time
embeddableConfig.description: Target HTTP responses over time, stacked and summed per bucket: 2xx (success, green), 4xx (client errors, yellow), 5xx (server errors, red). A rising 5xx band indicates backend failures; rising 4xx indicates client or request problems.

attributes.title: HTTP responses over time
attributes.description: Target HTTP responses over time, stacked and summed per bucket: 2xx (success, green), 4xx (client errors, yellow), 5xx (server errors, red). A rising 5xx band indicates backend failures; rising 4xx indicates client or request problems.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS success = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_2XX_Count`)), client_errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`)), server_errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT timestamp ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS success = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_2XX_Count`)), client_errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_4XX_Count`)), server_errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT timestamp ASC

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND TargetGroup IS NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount` IS NOT NULL | STATS invocations = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT invocations DESC | LIMIT 10

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND TargetGroup IS NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount` IS NOT NULL | STATS invocations = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`)) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT invocations DESC | LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.title: Active connections over time (sum)
embeddableConfig.description: Total active connections across all load balancers over time, summed per bucket. A primary traffic/capacity indicator; sustained growth signals rising load.

attributes.title: Active connections over time (sum)
attributes.description: Total active connections across all load balancers over time, summed per bucket. A primary traffic/capacity indicator; sustained growth signals rising load.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS active_conn = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`)) BY ts = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | SORT ts ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";

TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/TargetResponseTime`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, LoadBalancer ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

embeddableConfig.title: ELB load balancers — hexagon map (click a hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per ELB load balancer, ordered worst-first with target 5xx errors or degraded target health first. Toggle Color by between Status, Target 5xx errors, or Target Response Time; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for latency over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that load balancer.

savedVis.title: ELB load balancers — hexagon map
savedVis.description: One hexagon per ELB load balancer, ordered worst-first with target 5xx errors or degraded target health first. Toggle Color by between Status, Target 5xx errors, or Target Response Time; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for latency over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that load balancer.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS invocations = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | WHERE invocations IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, invocations DESC, LoadBalancer ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS invocations = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | WHERE invocations IS NOT NULL | SORT timestamp ASC, invocations DESC, LoadBalancer ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, errors DESC, LoadBalancer ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Sum" | STATS errors = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), LoadBalancer, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, errors DESC, LoadBalancer ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Number of load balancers with no recent signal — no requests, connections, or host counts within the 5-minute freshness window.

attributes.description: Number of idle load balancers — reporting metrics but serving no traffic, with no healthy/unhealthy hosts or errors, within a 5-minute freshness window.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" | STATS requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), rejected = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), active = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)), healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5 | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy", requests == 0 OR active == 0, "idle", "no data") | STATS no_data = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "no data"

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
FROM metrics-aws.elb.otel-* | WHERE LoadBalancer IS NOT NULL AND LoadBalancer != "" | STATS requests = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RequestCount`, NULL)), be_5xx = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HTTPCode_Target_5XX_Count`, NULL)), rejected = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/RejectedConnectionCount`, NULL)), active = SUM(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/ActiveConnectionCount`, NULL)), healthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/HealthyHostCount`, NULL)), unhealthy_n = MAX(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/ApplicationELB/UnHealthyHostCount`, NULL)), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY LoadBalancer, cloud.region | INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen) | WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5 | EVAL lb_state = CASE(be_5xx > 0, "erroring", unhealthy_n > 0 OR rejected > 0, "degraded", healthy_n > 0 OR requests > 0 OR active > 0, "healthy", requests == 0 OR active == 0, "idle", "no data") | STATS no_data = COUNT(*) WHERE lb_state == "no data"
